data.title: Dwight Capital and Dwight Mortgage Trust finance $446.8MM in real estate loans in June, including $230MM for 19-property portfolio in Ohio.
data.description: In Miami, Dwight Capital and its affiliate REIT, Dwight Mortgage Trust (“DMT”), recently completed real estate financings totaling $446.8 million in June. The predominant deal was a $230 million bridge loan facilitated by DMT for the acquisition of a 19-property skilled nursing/assisted living portfolio spread across Ohio. This portfolio includes 1,896 beds. Alongside the bridge loan, Dwight Healthcare Funding extended a $12 million working capital line of credit to support the project.

data.title: Stewart Title NCS introduces new UCC ONE product in Delaware; Group President says policy products adapting to industry changes.
data.description: In Houston, the UCC ONE specialized servicing group of Stewart Title National Commercial Services (NCS) revealed the approval of its revised and updated Policy Jacket product in Delaware. Erin Sheckler, the Group President of NCS, highlighted the importance of adapting to industry changes by ensuring their policy products stay current. This update reflects the commitment to meeting customer needs by keeping pace with industry developments.

data.title: Sagard Real Estate buys 14.2-acre land in Havre de Grace, plans for industrial development with Chesapeake Real Estate.
data.description: In Havre de Grace, Maryland, Sagard Real Estate, formerly EverWest Real Estate Investors, disclosed the purchase of 1621 Clark Road. Alongside Chesapeake Real Estate Group (CREG), they aim to transform the 14.2-acre property into a cutting-edge industrial distribution center. This initiative signifies a notable accomplishment for Sagard Real Estate's new open-end fund, focused on moderate value-add ventures, and marks their fourth recent acquisition.

data.title: Nissan Foundation grants $17.7 million to 37 US nonprofits supporting identity, inclusion, & community connection.
data.description: In Franklin, Tennessee, the Nissan Foundation is dedicated to supporting identity, inclusion, and belonging by awarding grants to 37 nonprofits throughout the U.S. The foundation's goal is to emphasize both the uniqueness that sets us apart and the commonality that unites us. This year's contributions mark a significant achievement, bringing the total grants distributed since its establishment to $17.7 million.

data.title: Divi Resorts offers two all-inclusive options for travelers at Divi Little Bay Beach Resort in St. Maarten.
data.description: Now offering two unique ways to experience paradise on St. Maarten, Divi Resorts in Philipsburg, St. Maarten announces an expansion in customization options for travelers. The move comes as a response to increasing requests for tailored vacation experiences. As of July 17, 2025, vacationers can indulge in more personalized amenities and services, amplifying their enjoyment while on the island. This initiative aims to cater to the rising desire for customized travel experiences, providing visitors with the opportunity to tailor their stays to their preferences.

data.title: Ohio launches new initiative to address critical shortages in behavioral health workforce with over 2.4 professionals needed.
data.description: A new awareness campaign has been launched in Ohio as part of the state's extensive initiative to attract and retain additional professionals in the expanding field. The campaign, rolled out in Columbus on July 17, 2025, responds to the increasing need for behavioral health services, which currently surpasses the available workforce by over 2.4...

data.title: PS Miner launches cloud mining for Solana (SOL) holders, enabling passive income without selling holdings. SOL upgraded network for 100,000 transactions/sec. Users can mine Ethereum, Litecoin, earn high daily returns without liquidating. PS Miner offers new profit strategies for SOL. SOL-based user registrations grow by over 250%.
data.description: In Eastleigh, England, the world's leading cloud mining platform, PS Miner, has introduced a new mining platform for Solana (SOL), aiming to provide specialized assistance to users. This initiative offers a novel method for users to generate passive income through crypto mining while retaining their core holdings. The introduction aligns with SOL's progression as a significant DeFi infrastructure asset. After a recent network upgrade, SOL can now facilitate over 100,000 transactions per second and incorporate advanced zero-knowledge proofs. PS Miner enables SOL holders to transform their dormant assets into mining contracts, allowing them to earn substantial daily profits by mining assets like Ethereum and Litecoin without needing to sell their SOL tokens. This launch marks the commencement of a new phase of profit opportunities for SOL. The platform has experienced a remarkable increase of over 250% in SOL-based user registrations, indicating strong interest in the new features that will redefine DeFi profit strategies.

data.title: Franklin Mint FCU named in Forbes 2025 America's Best-In-State Credit Unions list for 2nd year, among 222 top credit unions.
data.description: Franklin Mint Federal Credit Union, based in Chadds Ford, Pennsylvania, has been recently selected as one of the top "America's Best-In-State Credit Unions" by Forbes for the second year in a row. This prestigious recognition places FMFCU among a select group of 222 credit unions across the country. The achievement emphasizes the institution's commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction.

data.title: Integrity partners with Alliance Arete Financial for growth, gaining access to new products and tech. - July 17, 2025.
data.description: A reputable agency is transitioning into a period of significant growth by embracing Integrity's comprehensive vision. As of July 17, 2025, in Dallas, the agency is set to explore new horizons with access to a range of innovative products, state-of-the-art technology, and transformative service offerings. This move marks a pivotal moment for the agency as it gears up to expand and elevate its operations to the next level.

data.title: NYCRC provides $19M in funding for 9th charter school in NYC, Bold Charter School in the Bronx.
data.description: A recent transaction has been successfully completed to support the construction of Bold Charter School, a 700-student facility located in the Bronx, New York. The New York City Regional Center has finalized $19 million in New Market Tax Credit financing to aid in funding the project. This development marks a significant step towards the completion of the school, providing essential resources for its construction.
